ayahs.textArabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡفِيلِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biashabi alfeeli
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Have you not seen ˹O Prophet˺ how your Lord dealt with the Army of the Elephant?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Did He not frustrate their scheme?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He sent against them birds in flocks,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: For He sent against them flocks of birds,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: that pelted them with stones of baked clay,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And He made them like eaten straw.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: leaving them like chewed up straw.
